video_summary: This video explains the critical difference between HTTP and WebSocket protocols, emphasizing the need for real-time data in applications like trading, and provides a foundational understanding of establishing and implementing WebSocket communication.

concepts.colloquial_context: रियल टाइम डेटा, एंटिक्स की वैल्यू चेंज होगी, मार्केट चल रहा था
concepts.description: Information that is delivered immediately as it is collected, reflecting the current state, crucial for applications like trading apps that require up-to-the-minute updates.
Software applications used for buying and selling financial instruments, which heavily rely on up-to-the-minute market data for effective decision-making.

concepts.colloquial_context: एश्टी टीपी, एसटीटीपी रहाँ, एश्टी टीपी बरवाद कर रहाँ बखर
concepts.description: A stateless, request-response protocol primarily used for fetching web pages. Each client request generates a server response, but the connection is typically closed afterward. Described as 'like email' due to its turn-based communication.

concepts.colloquial_context: वेप सोकित, वेब सोकित प्रोटो कोड
concepts.description: A full-duplex communication protocol that provides persistent, bi-directional communication channels over a single TCP connection, allowing both client and server to send messages to each other at any time.

concepts.colloquial_context: क्लाएंट सर्वर को इक एक एक वेप श्टी टीपी रहाँ बाद कर गगे
concepts.description: The initial process where a client sends a regular HTTP GET request with specific headers to a server to initiate a WebSocket connection. If the server supports WebSockets, it responds with an HTTP status code 101 (Switching Protocols), establishing the persistent WebSocket connection.

concepts.colloquial_context: सेम ताईपर, क्लाईट अन सरवर एक दूछ़े से बाद कर सकते हैं, कोई भी कववी मेशच देशकता है एक दुस्टरे को
concepts.description: A communication system where both parties (client and server) can send and receive messages simultaneously and independently, without waiting for the other to finish. This is a key advantage of WebSockets over traditional HTTP.

concepts.colloquial_context: वब सोकत सरवर बिल्ग करने वालें, इंपोट एकसप्रेस, इंपोट समझें कोल वेब सोकित सरवर, क्रिएट आर आप आन लेँस सेट अप आर पोट
concepts.description: The process of writing server-side code (e.g., using Node.js with Express and a WebSocket library) to create a server that listens for and handles WebSocket connections, processes incoming messages, and sends outgoing messages to connected clients.

A feature in web browser developer tools used by developers to monitor and inspect network activity, including HTTP requests and WebSocket connections, allowing verification of connection status and message flow.

concepts.colloquial_context: एस ड़ोट औन कनेक्सिन, कनेक्सिन यूझ ने एवट, सेंट मैं मैसच्च्च्च्च
concepts.description: WebSocket communication relies on an event-driven model. Common events include 'connection' (when a client connects) and 'message' (when data is received from a connected client or sent to it), which trigger corresponding callback functions.

concepts.colloquial_context: वेप सोकित ब्राउजर आप याई, जावास्क्रिप्त से कैसे वेप्सोकित सरवाके फाज रेक्वेस जाए
concepts.description: A client-side JavaScript API available in web browsers that enables web pages to establish and interact with WebSocket servers, allowing them to send and receive messages asynchronously.
